abilities.name: Distracting Performance
abilities.description: When performing, allies within 10 yards gain + to Deceive, Pick Pocket, Stealth Challenges.

abilities.name: Flick of the Wrist
abilities.description: May use Grace instead of Might for Melee/Pugilism attacks.

abilities.name: Manipulative (10)
abilities.description: When enemy targets this character, they must pass TN 10 Willpower. On failure, may change target to legal choice.

actions: (1) Poisoned Hairpin (Melee) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/1/2 damage, gains Poison +1.
(1) Lure (Bewitch) | AV: 6 (11) | Rg: 18 | Resist: Wp | Living target moves toward this character. Mask Fatal Distraction: Friendly within 5 yards may make 1 AP attack.
(1) Expensive Gift (Bewitch) | AV: 6 (11) | Rg: 2 | Resist: Wp | Living target gives this character non-weapon item from hand.
system.notes: Beautiful, charming performers at Star Theater. Secretly trained Arcanist agents. Assist with Soulstone smuggling. Wield subtle stage and shadow magic.
